nasb.text: Then Absalom said, “If not, please let my brother Amnon go with us.” And the king said to him, “Why should he go with you?”

esv.text: Then Absalom said, “If not, please let my brother Amnon go with us.” And the king said to him, “Why should he go with you?”

cnv.text: 押沙龍說：“王若是不去，求王讓我的哥哥暗嫩與我一同去。”王問他：“為甚麼要他與你一同去呢？”

ccb.text: 押沙龙说：“倘若王不去，求你叫我兄弟暗嫩去吧。”大卫说：“何必要他同去呢？”
